examples: The real answer, of course, is “Buy a Corvette!”
The Corvette and rock `n` roll were both born in America, 50 years ago. Coincidence?
Don't be fooled by an exterior that appears similar to the standard 430-hp Corvette.
With no minivan blocking your garage, you have room for that Corvette convertible.
And even if you never plan to set foot in a Corvette, you should be glad.
